title: Better Levels
description: A resource pack that makes enchantments and potion levels look better.
body:
## 📕 Better Levels
A nifty little QOL resource pack to aid you with displaying bigger enchantment and potion effect levels correctly.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/H2H118OP6T)

## Usage
> ### 🔢 Number format
> To start using your desired number format, just select either the roman (XI) or the arabic (11) numeral version of the pack.
> ### ➕ Additional content
> If you want to see your status effects' levels in your inventory if they're over 10, you can download the optional Fabric mod for this resource pack [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-fix/)!
## Showcase
> ### Roman numerals (XI)
> ![A showcase of the roman numerals version of the pack and the optional mod.](https://github.com/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr.github.io/blob/main/about/roman.png?raw=true)
> ### Arabic numerals
> ![A showcase of the arabic numerals version of the pack and the optional mod.](https://github.com/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr.github.io/blob/main/about/arabic.png?raw=true)
